UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 685 GEARY STREET LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDINA, JOSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 685 GEARY STREET #207 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 685 GEARY STREET LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA, JOSE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
